properties.description: Opens the CryoTube, when set to 1. Closes it, when set to 0.
Turns the CryoTube on, when set to 1. Turns it off, when set to 0.
Returns whether the CryoTube is turned on and receives power. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns whether the CryoTube is flashing an error. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns the current amount of power, required by the CryoTube, in watts.
